name: Peanut Butter and Chocolate Cheesecakes
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup chocolate-covered graham crackers, finely crushed
1/2 cup semisweet chocolate chips, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Line muffin cups with paper baking cups.
2. Spread about 1 tablespoon crushed crackers in each cup. Set aside.
3. Beat cream cheese until smooth. Add sugar and vanilla. Beat until fluffy.
4. Add milk. Beat in eggs until combined.
5. Divide mixture into two parts.
6. Gradually stir peanut butter into half of the cheese mixture.
7. Stir chocolate into the remaining cheese mixture.
8. Spread 2 tablespoons of the peanut butter mixture evenly over cracker crumbs in each muffin cup.
9. Top each with 2 tablespoons of the chocolate mixture.
10. Bake at 325°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until set.
11. Cool on a wire rack.
12. Chill.
13. To serve, peel off paper cups and invert.
